title: Roast Chicken with Peruvian Spice and Fresh Roast Potatoes
description: A flavorful and aromatic roast chicken dish infused with Peruvian spices, served with crispy roast potatoes.
instructions: 2. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
3. Mix the Peruvian spice blend with olive oil, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Rub the spice mixture all over the chicken.
4. Place the chicken in a roasting pan and put it in the oven.
5. Roast the chicken for 45-50 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
6. While the chicken is cooking, peel the roast potatoes and cut them into large chunks.
7. Toss the potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper, and spread them out in a single layer on a baking sheet.
8. Roast the potatoes in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
9. Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving with the roast potatoes.
10. Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve hot.
